results.title: Vet chanced upon first H5 bird flu case - Australian Broadcasting Corporation
results.description: Vet chanced upon first H5 bird flu case Australian Broadcasting Corporation Australia news live: arrival of H5N1 bird flu a ‘genuine wildlife emergency’, experts say; fuel excise rebate extended for extra month The Guardian Worst fears confirmed as deadly H5 bird flu outbreak hits WA The West Australian Aussie animals at risk from global threat experts warn, after bird flu case confirmed Nine.com.au The first case of H5N1 bird flu in Australia has been confirmed. What does this mean? The Conversation
